title: Button Configuration
description: Configuration for action buttons in @es-plus/vue3 EsForm and EsTable

key.description: Button identifier. Special values: 'query' triggers table data fetch, 'rest' (NOT 'reset') resets the form

type.description: Button visual type (Element Plus button types)

direction.description: Button alignment in the form button area

loading.description: Show loading spinner on the button

disabled.description: Disable the button. Can be a boolean or a function () => boolean

triggerEvent.description: When true, automatically triggers form-table linkage. With key='query', calls parent EsTable's httpRequestInstance. With key='rest', resets form fields

click.description: Click handler. In form context: (model, formRef, httpRequestInstance?) => void. In dialog context: (instance, { close, getRefs, dialogVm }) => void

code.description: Button group position in table toolbar. 1 = left group, 2 = right group

isHide.description: Hide the button. Can be a boolean or a function () => boolean

permissionValue.description: Permission code for button visibility control

render.description: Custom render function for the button slot
